<script>
const TK='crew4',SU='https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbw14BXGP5DzUjFT9VY1Skgn6v54OPpn2yLTAOfPHr-LKFgQzssEc0WztiEomsMwgRnN/exec';
const DAYS=['Mon','Tue','Wed','Thu','Fri'];
let GD=null,AW=1;
const SC={sloop:{maxHP:2,maxLoot:100},brigantine:{maxHP:3,maxLoot:150},frigate:{maxHP:4,maxLoot:200},manowar:{maxHP:5,maxLoot:250}};

async function loadData(){
  try{
    document.getElementById('lu').textContent='Loading...';
    const r=await fetch(SU+'?team='+TK+'&t='+Date.now());
    GD=await r.json();
    render();
    document.getElementById('lu').textContent='Updated '+new Date().toLocaleTimeString();
    document.getElementById('loading').style.display='none';
    document.getElementById('page').style.display='block';
  }catch(e){
    document.getElementById('loading').innerHTML='<img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:200px;opacity:.8"><p style="color:#e05a5a;font-family:Cinzel,serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;margin-top:16px">CONNECTION ERROR</p><p style="color:#888;font-family:Crimson Text,serif;font-size:12px;margin-top:8px;padding:0 20px;text-align:center">Check that your Apps Script URL is set correctly.<br>'+e.message+'</p>';
  }
}

function g(id){return document.getElementById(id);}

function render(){
  const d=GD;
  g('crew-name').textContent=d.crewName||'—';
  g('crew-cap').textContent=d.captain?'Captain: '+d.captain:'';
  g('ap-n').textContent=d.ap||0;
  if(d.flag)g('flag-box').innerHTML='<img src="'+d.flag+'" alt="Flag">';
  [0,1,2].forEach(i=>{const e=g('cr'+i);if(d.crowns&&d.crowns[i])e.classList.add('found');else e.classList.remove('found');});
  renderFleet(d.ships||{});
  renderRelics(d.relics||{});
  renderTides(d.tides||{});
  g('bank-amt').textContent=(d.bank||0).toLocaleString();
  renderCalls(d.calls||[],d.startDate||'');
  renderSummons(d.summons||[]);
  renderMessages(d.messages||[]);
}

function renderFleet(ships){
  ['sloop','brigantine','frigate','manowar'].forEach(k=>{
    const s=ships[k]||{},cfg=SC[k];
    const hp=s.hp!==undefined?s.hp:cfg.maxHP;
    const pct=(hp/cfg.maxHP)*100;
    const col=pct>60?'#2d6e2d':pct>30?'#8a6420':'#8b1a1a';
    g('ship-name-'+k).textContent=s.name||'Unnamed';
    g('ship-bonus-'+k).textContent=s.bonusPower||'—';
    g('ship-loot-'+k).textContent=(s.loot||0)+' / '+cfg.maxLoot;
    g('ship-ammo-'+k).textContent=s.ammo!==undefined?s.ammo:'—';
    g('ship-hp-val-'+k).textContent=hp+' / '+cfg.maxHP+' HP';
    g('ship-hp-fill-'+k).style.width=pct+'%';
    g('ship-hp-fill-'+k).style.background=col;
  });
}

function renderRelics(r){
  ['compass','crow','flag','blessing','hand'].forEach(k=>{const e=g('relic-count-'+k);if(e)e.textContent=r[k]||0;});
}

function renderTides(t){
  [['t1','t1'],['t2','t2'],['t4','t4'],['t5','t5']].forEach(([k,id])=>{
    const w=g('tide-wrap-'+id),c=g('tide-check-'+id);
    if(!w)return;
    if(t[k]){w.classList.remove('locked');w.classList.add('unlocked');if(c)c.style.display='flex';}
    else{w.classList.add('locked');w.classList.remove('unlocked');if(c)c.style.display='none';}
  });
}

function getWeeks(sd){
  if(!sd)return[];
  const weeks=[],start=new Date(sd+'T12:00:00'),day=start.getDay(),mon=new Date(start);
  mon.setDate(start.getDate()-(day===0?6:day-1));
  for(let w=0;w<4;w++){const wk=[];for(let d=0;d<5;d++){const dt=new Date(mon);dt.setDate(mon.getDate()+w*7+d);wk.push(dt);}weeks.push(wk);}
  return weeks;
}
function fd(d){return(d.getMonth()+1)+'/'+d.getDate();}
function ff(d){return d.toISOString().slice(0,10);}

function renderCalls(calls,sd){
  const weeks=getWeeks(sd),sel=g('wsb');
  sel.innerHTML='';
  if(!weeks.length){g('ctw').innerHTML='<div class="nd">Game start date not set.</div>';return;}
  weeks.forEach((_,i)=>{
    const b=document.createElement('button');
    b.className='wb'+(AW===i+1?' active':'');
    b.textContent='Week '+(i+1);
    b.onclick=()=>{AW=i+1;renderCalls(calls,sd);};
    sel.appendChild(b);
  });
  const wk=weeks[AW-1];
  let h='<table class="ct"><thead><tr><th>Date</th><th>R1</th><th>R2</th><th>R3</th><th>R4</th><th>Total</th></tr></thead><tbody>',wt=0;
  wk.forEach(dt=>{
    const ds=ff(dt),e=calls.find(c=>c.date===ds)||{};
    const r1=parseInt(e.r1)||0,r2=parseInt(e.r2)||0,r3=parseInt(e.r3)||0,r4=parseInt(e.r4)||0,tot=r1+r2+r3+r4;
    wt+=tot;
    h+=`<tr><td class="dc">${fd(dt)} ${DAYS[dt.getDay()-1]||''}</td><td>${e.r1||'—'}</td><td>${e.r2||'—'}</td><td>${e.r3||'—'}</td><td>${e.r4||'—'}</td><td style="font-weight:600">${tot||'—'}</td></tr>`;
  });
  h+=`<tr class="tr"><td colspan="5">WEEK ${AW} TOTAL</td><td>${wt||'—'}</td></tr></tbody></table>`;
  g('ctw').innerHTML=h;
  const apc=g('apc');
  if(wt>0){apc.style.display='flex';g('ct').textContent=wt;g('cap').textContent=Math.floor(wt/5);}
  else apc.style.display='none';
}

function renderSummons(summons){
  const sg=g('sg');
  if(!summons.length){sg.innerHTML='<div class="nd" style="grid-column:1/-1">No summons yet.</div>';return;}
  sg.innerHTML=summons.map(s=>{
    const cls=s.status==='Success'?'ok':s.status==='Failure'?'fail':s.status==='In Progress'?'ip':'pend';
    const lbl=s.status==='pending'?'—':s.status;
    return`<div class="scard"><div class="snum">${s.num}</div><div class="sst ${cls}">${lbl}</div><div class="sdet">${s.details||''}</div></div>`;
  }).join('');
}

function renderMessages(msgs){
  const mb=g('mb');
  if(!msgs.length){mb.innerHTML='<div class="nd">No messages from the Game Masters yet.</div>';return;}
  mb.innerHTML=msgs.map(m=>`<div class="me"><div class="md">${m.date||''}</div><div class="mt${m.important?' imp':''}">${m.text}</div></div>`).join('');
}

setInterval(loadData,120000);
loadData();
